title: Implement Meshtastic app text message ingress into LICHEN local interface
description: Why this exists: the MVP requires the standard app to send a message into LICHEN. What needs to be done: decode the app's text/send packet path, validate destination/channel semantics for the MVP, translate it to the LICHEN local message/CoAP interface or internal send API, and return a Meshtastic-compatible acknowledgement/error. Acceptance criteria: native_sim or host-side test sends a Meshtastic text packet and observes the expected LICHEN local message call; unsupported destinations/channels return explicit errors; payload length and encoding limits are enforced; no Meshtastic RF framing is transmitted over LoRa.
notes:
2026-07-01 progress: implemented no-hardware adapter-boundary portion for Meshtastic TEXT_MESSAGE_APP ingress. Common Zephyr adapter now parses MeshPacket from/to/channel/id/want_ack, requires explicit broadcast destination 0xffffffff for MVP text, rejects non-broadcast destinations until a resolver exists, rejects non-primary channel, empty payload, invalid UTF-8, and payloads over LICHEN_MESHTASTIC_TEXT_PAYLOAD_MAX=200. Added tests for broadcast success, explicit from plus channel=0, missing destination, directed unsupported, secondary channel unsupported, empty payload, invalid UTF-8 including overlong/truncated/surrogate cases, valid multibyte UTF-8, max-size success, and over-limit unsupported. Gateway callback now returns -ENOTSUP instead of queueStatus OK because the concrete /msg or local send contract is not implemented yet; created project-LICHEN-t2hn.7.2 and made it a blocker for final closure. Created project-LICHEN-t2hn.7.1 for directed Meshtastic node_num to LICHEN peer resolution.

Verification: git diff --check PASS. west build -p always -b qemu_x86 lichen/tests/meshtastic_adapter -d build/meshtastic_adapter_qemu_t2hn7 plus timeout-wrapped west build -d build/meshtastic_adapter_qemu_t2hn7 -t run PASS by PROJECT EXECUTION SUCCESSFUL: meshtastic_adapter 30/30, RAM 196664 B / 31 MB, only normal timeout termination after success marker. No qemu-system-i386 processes remain.

Post-review fixes: require a handle_text hook before reporting queueStatus OK; test absent hook as unsupported; test hook returning -ENOTSUP as unsupported to cover current gateway behavior; implement MeshPacket payload_variant oneof last-member semantics so encrypted after decoded clears text state; test decoded TEXT_MESSAGE_APP followed by encrypted as unsupported; raise meshtastic_adapter ztest stack to 8192 for existing large queue fixtures; document packet_info.payload lifetime as valid only during handle_text. Verification after fixes: git diff --check PASS. west build -p always -b qemu_x86 lichen/tests/meshtastic_adapter -d build/meshtastic_adapter_qemu_t2hn7 plus timeout-wrapped west build -d build/meshtastic_adapter_qemu_t2hn7 -t run PASS by PROJECT EXECUTION SUCCESSFUL: meshtastic_adapter 33/33, RAM 200760 B / 31 MB. west build -p always -b qemu_x86 lichen/apps/gateway -d build/gateway_qemu_t2hn7 PASS, RAM 235676 B / 31 MB. No qemu-system-i386 processes remain. twister-out/ remains untracked and must not be committed.
close_reason: All children closed, tests pass (33/33 on qemu_x86). Message ingress implemented with UTF-8 validation, payload limits, broadcast-only MVP, and hook-based gateway callback.
